storyline_timeline.summary:
**美国考虑从毛里求斯购买查戈斯群岛**

据《每日电讯报》报道，白宫正考虑从毛里求斯购买查戈斯群岛，以确保迪戈加西亚基地的控制权。此前英国计划将主权移交给毛里求斯，但遭特朗普批评。美国官员称迪戈加西亚对国家安全至关重要。

storyline_timeline.summary:
**俄罗斯无人机袭击切尔诺贝利核废料储存设施**

乌克兰官员称，俄罗斯一架沙希德无人机于6月7日凌晨袭击了切尔诺贝利核电站附近的乏核燃料储存设施，部分损毁了接收大楼。当时设施内未存放核燃料，辐射水平正常。乌克兰总统泽连斯基谴责这是“极其卑鄙的”攻击。

storyline_timeline.summary:
**教皇利奥十四世在马德里主持弥撒，逾120万人参加**

教皇利奥十四世6月7日在西班牙马德里西贝莱斯广场主持露天弥撒，主办方称超过120万人参加。教皇呼吁复兴天主教信仰，并强调帮助穷人和被压迫者。这是教皇15年来首次访问西班牙。

storyline_timeline.summary:
**习近平在朝鲜《劳动新闻》发表署名文章**

6月8日，在赴朝鲜进行国事访问之际，中共中央总书记、国家主席习近平在朝鲜《劳动新闻》发表题为《继往开来、砥砺同行 续写中朝传统友谊崭新篇章》的署名文章。文章强调中朝传统友谊牢不可破，并提出深化战略沟通、加强务实合作等四点主张。

confirmed_claims: 特朗普：内塔尼亚胡，你最好小心点！
△美国总统特朗普（资料图） 美国总统特朗普8日表示，他曾警告以色列总理内塔尼亚胡，如果与伊朗再开战，以色列可能陷入孤立无援境地。
内塔尼亚胡称“暂停”袭击伊朗
以色列总理内塔尼亚胡8日在电视讲话中表示，目前对伊朗的袭击已“暂停”，但伊朗若恢复袭击以色列，以色列将以武力回应。
伊朗宣布结束对以军事行动 以色列应美方要求暂停袭击
伊朗宣布结束对以军事行动 以色列应美方要求暂停袭击 中新社北京6月8日电 据伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社8日报道，伊朗武装部队哈塔姆安比亚中央总部当日发表声明称，在回应以色列近期针对黎巴嫩南部及贝鲁特南郊的军事行动后，伊朗武装力量目前已结束本轮军事行动。

clusters.headline: 伊朗与以色列短暂交火后宣布停止袭击，特朗普居中斡旋
clusters.summary: 6月7日至8日，伊朗与以色列爆发自4月停火以来最大规模交火。伊朗向以色列发射约30枚导弹，以色列对伊朗中部和西部军事目标实施两轮空袭。随后伊朗宣布结束军事行动，以色列应美国总统特朗普要求暂停袭击。特朗普称双方均寻求立即停火，和平谈判正在进行。
clusters.headline_en: Iran and Israel exchange brief fire, then announce halt to attacks, with Trump mediating
clusters.summary_en: From June 7 to 8, Iran and Israel engaged in their largest exchange of fire since the April ceasefire. Iran fired about 30 missiles at Israel, and Israel conducted two rounds of airstrikes on military targets in central and western Iran. Iran then announced the end of military operations, and Israel suspended attacks at the request of US President Trump. Trump said both sides seek an immediate ceasefire and peace talks are underway.

storyline_timeline.summary:
**亚美尼亚执政党在议会选举中领先**

亚美尼亚中央选举委员会初步计票结果显示，总理帕什尼扬领导的公民协议党以54.44%得票率领先，亲俄的强亚美尼亚党以约22%居次。帕什尼扬宣布获胜并将单独组建政府。选举结果被视为对和平进程与亲西方路线的支持。

storyline_timeline.summary:
**亚美尼亚议会选举投票率创近年新高**

亚美尼亚6月7日举行议会选举，投票率约59%，为2017年以来最高。总理帕什尼扬领导的公民协议党在初步计票中以54%领先，亲俄的强亚美尼亚党以22%居次。选举被视为对帕什尼扬亲西方路线的公投。

clusters.headline_en: Armenian PM Pashinyan Declares Victory in Parliamentary Election, Consolidating Pro-Western Course

clusters.summary: 美国总统特朗普在接受BBC采访时表示，以色列总理内塔尼亚胡并未违抗他的命令，因为导弹发射时他正在与内塔尼亚胡通话。特朗普此前要求内塔尼亚胡不要报复伊朗，但以色列仍发动了攻击。特朗普称自己“说了算”，内塔尼亚胡别无选择只能接受美国与伊朗的协议。
clusters.headline_en: Trump says Netanyahu did not defy his orders, but Israel still launched attack on Iran
clusters.summary_en: US President Trump said in an interview with the BBC that Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu did not defy his orders because he was on the phone with Netanyahu when the missiles were launched. Trump had previously asked Netanyahu not to retaliate against Iran, but Israel still launched the attack. Trump claimed he was "the one who calls the shots" and that Netanyahu had no choice but to accept the US-Iran agreement.

clusters.headline: 中朝峰会聚焦战略协作，未提无核化议题
clusters.summary: 中国国家主席习近平与朝鲜最高领导人金正恩6月8日在平壤举行会谈，双方同意加强高层往来及各领域交流合作。与2019年峰会不同，此次会谈及公开文件未涉及半岛无核化议题，重点转向战略协作与维护主权安全。分析认为这反映中国对朝鲜拥核现实更为务实的态度。
clusters.headline_en: China-North Korea Summit Focuses on Strategic Coordination, Omits Denuclearization
clusters.summary_en: Chinese President Xi Jinping and North Korean Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un held talks in Pyongyang on June 8, agreeing to strengthen high-level exchanges and cooperation in various fields. Unlike the 2019 summit, this meeting and public documents did not address denuclearization on the Korean Peninsula, shifting focus to strategic coordination and safeguarding sovereignty and security. Analysts say this reflects China's more pragmatic attitude toward North Korea's nuclear reality.

clusters.headline: OpenAI秘密提交IPO申请，AI公司上市竞赛加速
clusters.summary: OpenAI于6月8日向美国证券交易委员会秘密提交S-1表格，启动首次公开募股程序。该公司估值约8520亿美元。此前竞争对手Anthropic已于6月1日提交申请，SpaceX也已启动IPO路演。三家公司可能相继上市，合计融资规模或达千亿美元。OpenAI未透露具体时间表。
clusters.headline_en: OpenAI Files Confidential IPO Application, AI Company Listing Race Accelerates
clusters.summary_en: OpenAI submitted a confidential S-1 filing to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on June 8, initiating its initial public offering process. The company is valued at approximately $852 billion. Competitor Anthropic had previously filed on June 1, and SpaceX has also started its IPO roadshow. The three companies may go public in succession, with total fundraising potentially reaching hundreds of billions of dollars. OpenAI has not disclosed a specific timeline.

storyline_timeline.summary:
**亚美尼亚执政党在议会选举中领先**

亚美尼亚中央选举委员会初步计票结果显示，总理帕什尼扬领导的公民协议党以54.44%得票率领先，亲俄的强亚美尼亚党以约22%居次。帕什尼扬宣布获胜并将单独组建政府。选举结果被视为对和平进程与亲西方路线的支持。

storyline_timeline.summary:
**亚美尼亚议会选举投票率创近年新高**

亚美尼亚6月7日举行议会选举，投票率约59%，为2017年以来最高。总理帕什尼扬领导的公民协议党在初步计票中以54%领先，亲俄的强亚美尼亚党以22%居次。选举被视为对帕什尼扬亲西方路线的公投。

clusters.headline: 美国联邦法官裁定特朗普10万美元H-1B签证费违法
clusters.summary: 美国波士顿联邦地区法官利奥·索罗金裁定，特朗普政府对H-1B签证征收10万美元申请费的行政令构成非法税收，缺乏国会授权，必须撤销。该诉讼由20个民主党州总检察长提起。白宫表示将上诉，称总统拥有明确法律权力。费用上涨已导致签证申请量锐减。
clusters.headline_en: U.S. federal judge rules Trump's $100,000 H-1B visa fee illegal
clusters.summary_en: U.S. District Judge Leo Sorokin in Boston ruled that the Trump administration's executive order imposing a $100,000 application fee on H-1B visas constitutes an illegal tax lacking congressional authorization and must be revoked. The lawsuit was filed by attorneys general from 20 Democratic states. The White House said it will appeal, claiming the president has clear legal authority. The fee increase has led to a sharp decline in visa applications.

5月中国进出口总值同比增长16.9%
5月中国进出口总值同比增长16.9% 中新社北京6月9日电 (记者 尹倩芸)中国海关总署9日公布的最新数据显示，5月中国货物贸易进出口总值4.45万亿元(人民币，下同)，同比增长16.9%。其中，出口同比增长13.8%；进口同比增长21.5%。
clusters.evidence_summary: 4 sources assessed; 4 claim(s) have source support.
clusters.headline: 中国5月出口同比增长19.4%，进口增长27.4%
clusters.summary: 中国海关总署6月9日公布数据，5月中国出口（以美元计）同比增长19.4%，进口增长27.4%，均超预期。前5个月进出口总值20.68万亿元人民币，同比增长15.3%。对美出口增长35.4%，汽车、半导体等科技产品出口强劲。分析认为出口成为中国经济的重要缓冲。
clusters.headline_en: China's May exports up 19.4% year-on-year, imports up 27.4%
clusters.summary_en: China's General Administration of Customs released data on June 9, showing that in May, China's exports (in USD) increased by 19.4% year-on-year, and imports increased by 27.4%, both exceeding expectations. In the first five months, the total value of imports and exports was 20.68 trillion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 15.3%. Exports to the US increased by 35.4%, and exports of technology products such as automobiles and semiconductors were strong. Analysts believe that exports have become an important buffer for China's economy.

clusters.headline: 北约战机在拉脱维亚首次击落入侵无人机
clusters.summary: 6月8日，一架无人机侵入拉脱维亚领空，北约波罗的海空中巡逻任务的法国阵风战机将其击落。拉脱维亚军方称无人机因俄罗斯电子战系统偏离航线。这是北约首次在拉脱维亚领空击落无人机。同日，摩尔多瓦也报告一架无人机坠毁。
clusters.headline_en: NATO fighter jet shoots down invading drone in Latvia for first time
clusters.summary_en: On June 8, a drone intruded into Latvian airspace and was shot down by a French Rafale fighter jet on NATO's Baltic Air Policing mission. The Latvian military stated that the drone deviated from its course due to Russian electronic warfare systems. This is the first time NATO has shot down a drone in Latvian airspace. On the same day, Moldova also reported a drone crash.

clusters.headline_en: Peru presidential election count deadlocked, leftist candidate narrowly ahead
clusters.summary_en: The vote count after the second round of Peru's presidential election is extremely close. Leftist candidate Roberto Sanchez holds a narrow lead with approximately 50.04% of the vote over conservative Keiko Fujimori (49.96%). With about 400,000 votes disputed, the final result may take days or even weeks to determine. Whoever wins will become Peru's ninth president in ten years.

clusters.headline: 马斯克详解SpaceX太空AI数据中心计划：明年实现1GW算力部署
clusters.summary: SpaceX CEO埃隆·马斯克在IPO前夕发布视频，首次详细披露轨道AI数据中心计划。第一代AI卫星“AI1”峰值功耗150千瓦，翼展70米，将部署在低地球轨道。马斯克称技术已成熟，目标2027年底前实现年化1GW算力部署，并最终扩展至太瓦级。但行业分析认为经济可行性存疑。
clusters.headline_en: Musk Details SpaceX Space AI Data Center Plan: 1GW Computing Power Deployment Next Year
clusters.summary_en: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk released a video on the eve of the IPO, revealing for the first time detailed orbital AI data center plans. The first-generation AI satellite "AI1" has a peak power consumption of 150 kilowatts and a wingspan of 70 meters, and will be deployed in low Earth orbit. Musk said the technology is mature, with a goal of achieving an annualized 1GW computing power deployment by the end of 2027, and eventually expanding to terawatt levels. However, industry analysts question its economic feasibility.

clusters.headline: 泽连斯基会见英国国王查尔斯，计划邀请其访问乌克兰
clusters.summary: 乌克兰总统泽连斯基6月8日在英国访问期间，在温莎城堡会见国王查尔斯三世。泽连斯基表示计划邀请查尔斯对乌克兰进行国事访问，这将是自俄乌战争爆发以来最重量级的王室访问。查尔斯一直是乌克兰的坚定支持者。泽连斯基还与英法德领导人举行会谈。
clusters.headline_en: Zelensky meets UK King Charles, plans to invite him to visit Ukraine
clusters.summary_en: Ukrainian President Zelensky met King Charles III at Windsor Castle on June 8 during his visit to the UK. Zelensky said he plans to invite Charles for a state visit to Ukraine, which would be the most high-profile royal visit since the outbreak of the Russia-Ukraine war. Charles has been a staunch supporter of Ukraine. Zelensky also held talks with leaders of the UK, France, and Germany.

clusters.headline: 古巴西部海域发生6.1级地震，佛罗里达有震感
clusters.summary: 6月8日，古巴西部海域发生6.1级地震，震源深度10公里。哈瓦那建筑摇晃，震感远至美国佛罗里达州。迈阿密-戴德县出于谨慎疏散多栋建筑，通勤列车暂停服务。美国地质调查局称这是墨西哥湾有现代记录以来最大地震，未造成伤亡或重大损失。
clusters.headline_en: Magnitude 6.1 earthquake strikes off western Cuba, felt in Florida
clusters.summary_en: On June 8, a magnitude 6.1 earthquake struck off the western coast of Cuba at a depth of 10 kilometers. Buildings shook in Havana, and tremors were felt as far away as Florida, USA. Miami-Dade County evacuated several buildings as a precaution and suspended commuter train services. The U.S. Geological Survey said it was the largest earthquake on modern record in the Gulf of Mexico, with no casualties or major damage reported.

clusters.headline: 特朗普在纽约NBA总决赛现场遭观众嘘声
clusters.summary: 6月8日晚，美国总统特朗普成为首位现场观看NBA总决赛的在任总统。他在纽约麦迪逊广场花园观看尼克斯对阵马刺的第三场比赛。当大屏幕显示特朗普敬礼画面时，现场响起巨大嘘声。特朗普的到场导致周边街道封锁，引发球迷不满。
clusters.headline_en: Trump booed by crowd at NBA Finals in New York
clusters.summary_en: On the evening of June 8, U.S. President Donald Trump became the first sitting president to attend an NBA Finals game in person. He watched Game 3 between the Knicks and the Spurs at Madison Square Garden in New York. When the big screen showed Trump saluting, loud boos erupted from the crowd. Trump's presence led to the closure of surrounding streets, causing dissatisfaction among fans.

clusters.headline_en: Pentagon adds Alibaba, BYD and other Chinese companies to military-linked list
clusters.summary_en: The U.S. Department of Defense updated its 1260H list, adding Chinese companies including Alibaba, Baidu, BYD and Unitree Technology, claiming they support the Chinese military. The list has expanded to 188 entities, which are barred from receiving U.S. defense contracts. China's embassy in the U.S. condemned the move as "overstretching the concept of national security." The move could further escalate U.S.-China tech tensions.

clusters.headline: 菲律宾棉兰老岛附近海域发生7.8级强震，已致37人死亡
clusters.summary: 6月8日上午，菲律宾南部棉兰老岛附近海域发生7.8级地震，震源深度约40公里。截至6月9日，已造成37人死亡，千余次余震。震中附近城市桑托斯将军城受灾严重，多处建筑倒塌，电力中断，机场暂停运营。海啸监测到最高1.4米浪高，日本发布海啸预警并疏散4.5万人。
clusters.headline_en: Magnitude 7.8 Earthquake Strikes Near Mindanao, Philippines, Killing 37
clusters.summary_en: On the morning of June 8, a magnitude 7.8 earthquake struck near Mindanao in the southern Philippines, with a focal depth of about 40 km. As of June 9, it has caused 37 deaths and thousands of aftershocks. The city of General Santos near the epicenter was severely affected, with multiple building collapses, power outages, and airport suspension. Tsunami waves up to 1.4 meters were recorded, and Japan issued a tsunami warning, evacuating 45,000 people.

clusters.headline: 国际刑事法院首席检察官卡里姆·汗因性行为不端被停职
clusters.summary: 国际刑事法院首席检察官卡里姆·汗因性行为不端指控被暂停职务。法院监督机构执行委员会投票决定将其提交缔约国大会特别会议，以决定其去留。联合国调查发现汗与一名女助手存在非自愿性接触的证据。汗否认所有不当行为。这是ICC历史上首次此类停职。
clusters.headline_en: ICC Chief Prosecutor Karim Khan Suspended for Sexual Misconduct
clusters.summary_en: Karim Khan, the chief prosecutor of the International Criminal Court, has been suspended over allegations of sexual misconduct. The court's oversight body, the Executive Council, voted to refer the matter to a special session of the Assembly of States Parties to decide his fate. A UN investigation found evidence of non-consensual sexual contact between Khan and a female assistant. Khan denies all wrongdoing. This is the first such suspension in ICC history.

clusters.summary: 纽约联邦储备银行5月消费者预期调查显示，美国人对劳动力市场看法转向悲观。认为未来12个月内能找到工作的受访者比例降至43.7%，为去年12月以来最低；预期失业概率升至15.1%。同时，一年期通胀预期从3.6%小幅回落至3.5%。消费者财务状况评估恶化。
clusters.headline_en: NY Fed Survey: US Job Seekers' Outlook Worsens, Inflation Expectations Edge Down
clusters.summary_en: The New York Federal Reserve Bank's May Consumer Expectations Survey shows Americans turning pessimistic about the labor market. The share of respondents who believe they can find a job in the next 12 months fell to 43.7%, the lowest since last December; the expected probability of unemployment rose to 15.1%. Meanwhile, one-year inflation expectations edged down from 3.6% to 3.5%. Consumers' assessment of their financial situation deteriorated.

**美国考虑从毛里求斯购买查戈斯群岛**

**俄罗斯无人机袭击切尔诺贝利核废料储存设施**

乌克兰官员称，俄罗斯一架沙希德无人机于6月7日凌晨袭击了切尔诺贝利核电站附近的乏核燃料储存设施，部分损毁了接收大楼。当时设施内未存放核燃料，辐射水平正常。乌克兰总统泽连斯基谴责这是“极其卑鄙的”攻击。

**教皇利奥十四世在马德里主持弥撒，逾120万人参加**

教皇利奥十四世6月7日在西班牙马德里西贝莱斯广场主持露天弥撒，主办方称超过120万人参加。教皇呼吁复兴天主教信仰，并强调帮助穷人和被压迫者。这是教皇15年来首次访问西班牙。

6月8日，在赴朝鲜进行国事访问之际，中共中央总书记、国家主席习近平在朝鲜《劳动新闻》发表题为《继往开来、砥砺同行 续写中朝传统友谊崭新篇章》的署名文章。文章强调中朝传统友谊牢不可破，并提出深化战略沟通、加强务实合作等四点主张。

clusters.headline: 苹果WWDC 2026发布Siri AI及Apple Intelligence重大更新
clusters.summary: 苹果在WWDC 2026上正式推出Siri AI，这是基于Apple Intelligence平台全面重构的语音助手，将具备更自然的对话能力、屏幕内容识别和跨应用操作功能。Siri AI将拥有独立应用，并集成Google Gemini技术。该更新将于今年秋季推送，但欧盟用户因数字市场法案合规问题，初期无法在iPhone和iPad上使用。
clusters.headline_en: Apple WWDC 2026 Unveils Major Siri AI and Apple Intelligence Updates
clusters.summary_en: At WWDC 2026, Apple officially launched Siri AI, a fully revamped voice assistant based on the Apple Intelligence platform, featuring more natural conversation capabilities, on-screen content recognition, and cross-app operations. Siri AI will have its own standalone app and integrate Google Gemini technology. The update will roll out this fall, but EU users will initially be unable to use it on iPhone and iPad due to Digital Markets Act compliance issues.

clusters.headline: 苹果发布iOS 27、macOS 27 Golden Gate等系统更新，聚焦性能优化
clusters.summary: 苹果在WWDC 2026上发布iOS 27、iPadOS 27及macOS 27 Golden Gate。新系统继续完善Liquid Glass设计语言，新增透明度调节滑块，优化窗口圆角与侧边栏。苹果强调性能提升、应用启动加速及处理器管理优化。Siri AI等跨平台功能也将集成。
clusters.headline_en: Apple Releases iOS 27, macOS 27 Golden Gate and Other System Updates, Focusing on Performance Optimization
clusters.summary_en: At WWDC 2026, Apple released iOS 27, iPadOS 27, and macOS 27 Golden Gate. The new systems continue to refine the Liquid Glass design language, adding a new transparency adjustment slider, optimizing window rounded corners and sidebars. Apple emphasizes performance improvements, faster app launch, and processor management optimization. Cross-platform features such as Siri AI will also be integrated.

初探苹果 watchOS 27：升级 Siri AI、增强健康追踪、优化智能叠放
IT之家 6 月 9 日消息，在今天（6 月 9 日）召开的 2026 年全球开发者大会（WWDC）上，苹果公司预览发布 watchOS 27 系统更新， 聚焦升级 Siri AI、健康追踪、健身辅导与智能叠放（Smart Stack）。
Apple announces watchOS 27, now with Siri AI

Apple just announced watchOS 27, the next version of its Apple Watch operating system, introducing support for Siri AI, a redesigned "dynamic" app grid, and improvements to health and fitness tracking.

clusters.headline: 苹果发布watchOS 27，引入Siri AI并淘汰部分旧设备
clusters.summary: 苹果在WWDC 2026上预览watchOS 27，主要升级包括Siri AI支持、健康追踪增强、智能叠放优化及动态应用网格。新系统仅支持Apple Watch Series 10及更新机型，淘汰部分较旧型号。同时iPadOS 27也停止支持多款旧iPad。
clusters.headline_en: Apple Releases watchOS 27, Introduces Siri AI and Drops Some Older Devices

clusters.headline_en: macOS 27 Golden Gate Officially Ends Support for Intel Macs
clusters.summary_en: Apple's macOS 27 Golden Gate no longer supports any Intel-based Mac, only compatible with devices powered by Apple Silicon. 2026-06-08T13:37:12+08:00 中国国家主席习近平星期一（6月8日）中午抵达平壤，开始对朝鲜进行两天国事访问。朝鲜最高领导人金正恩在平壤金日成广场为习近平举行欢迎仪式，广场正中悬挂着中朝两党两国最高领导人巨幅肖像，阅兵现场鸣放礼炮21响，朝鲜三军仪仗队员用朝语高呼“祝习近平同志身体健康”。

clusters.headline: 习近平抵达平壤开始对朝鲜进行国事访问
clusters.summary: 中国国家主席习近平6月8日中午抵达平壤，开始对朝鲜进行为期两天的国事访问。朝鲜最高领导人金正恩在机场亲自迎接，并在金日成广场举行盛大欢迎仪式，鸣放礼炮21响，三军仪仗队高呼“祝习近平同志身体健康”。这是习近平时隔七年再次访朝。
clusters.headline_en: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang for state visit to North Korea
clusters.summary_en: Chinese President Xi Jinping arrived in Pyongyang at noon on June 8 for a two-day state visit to North Korea. North Korean leader Kim Jong Un personally greeted him at the airport and held a grand welcoming ceremony at Kim Il Sung Square, with a 21-gun salute and the three services honor guard shouting "Wish Comrade Xi Jinping good health." This is Xi's first visit to North Korea in seven years.

亚美尼亚6月7日举行议会选举，投票率约59%，为2017年以来最高。总理帕什尼扬领导的公民协议党在初步计票中以54%领先，亲俄的强亚美尼亚党以22%居次。选举被视为对帕什尼扬亲西方路线的公投。

clusters.headline: 习近平与彭丽媛在平壤参谒中朝友谊塔并观看文艺演出
clusters.summary: 6月8日晚，习近平和夫人彭丽媛在金正恩夫妇陪同下，在平壤体育馆观看专场文艺演出。6月9日上午，习近平夫妇参谒中朝友谊塔，向志愿军烈士默哀。随后习近平在金正恩陪同下参访朝鲜劳动党中央干部学校，并共同种下象征友谊的枞树。
clusters.headline_en: Xi Jinping and Peng Liyuan visit China-DPRK Friendship Tower and watch performance in Pyongyang
clusters.summary_en: On the evening of June 8, Xi Jinping and his wife Peng Liyuan, accompanied by Kim Jong Un and his wife, watched a special performance at the Pyongyang Gymnasium. On the morning of June 9, Xi Jinping and his wife visited the China-DPRK Friendship Tower and observed a moment of silence for the fallen Chinese People's Volunteers. Afterwards, Xi Jinping, accompanied by Kim Jong Un, visited the Central Cadre School of the Workers' Party of Korea and jointly planted a fir tree symbolizing friendship.
